title: protium heptaphyllum subsp. cordatum
intro: Protium heptaphyllum subsp. cordatum, also known as Cordia heptaphylla, is a plant species within the Borreria genus and the Rubiaceae family. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits of Protium heptaphyllum subsp. cordatum include its potential to alleviate symptoms of fever, cough, and respiratory issues, as well as its ability to support digestive health. Herbal preparations of this plant include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which are often used to treat various health conditions.
